name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BakeryMutex ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Process identifiers *)
VARIABLES state, ticket

(* State values *)
Idle == 0
Trying == 1
Critical == 2

(* Initial state: all processes idle, no tickets *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> Idle]
        /\ ticket = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Helper: next ticket number for a process *)
NextTicket(i) == MAX(ticket) + 1

(* Process i enters the trying state and takes a ticket *)
Enter(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = Idle
  /\ ticket' = [ticket EXCEPT ![i] = NextTicket(i)]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Trying]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, ticket>>

(* Process i enters the critical section if it has the lowest ticket *)
EnterCritical(i) ==
  LET others == {j \in 1..N : j # i}
  IN /\ state[i] = Trying
     /\ ticket[i] = MIN({ticket[j] : j \in others})
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Critical]
     /\ UNCHANGED ticket

(* Process i exits the critical section *)
Exit(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = Critical
  /\ ticket' = [ticket EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Idle]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, ticket>>

(* STRING process may perform one of the above actions *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    Enter(i) \/ EnterCritical(i) \/ Exit(i)

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in Critical *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {Idle, Trying, Critical}]
  /\ ticket \in [1..N -> Nat]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, ticket>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES votes, state

(* Participants are 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* State can be "init", "prepare", "commit", "abort" *)
State == {"init", "prepare", "commit", "abort"}

(* Initial state: all votes unknown, state init *)
Init == votes = [p \in Participants |-> "unknown"] /\ state = "init"

(* Helper: all participants have voted yes *)
AllYes(v) == \A p \in Participants : v[p] = "yes"

(* Helper: all participants have voted no *)
AllNo(v) == \A p \in Participants : v[p] = "no"

(* Helper: all participants have voted either yes or no *)
AllVoted(v) == \A p \in Participants : v[p] \in {"yes", "no"}

(* Helper: all participants have voted yes or no, and at least one voted no *)
SomeNo(v) == AllVoted(v) /\ \E p \in Participants : v[p] = "no"

(* Helper: all participants have voted yes or no, and at least one voted yes *)
SomeYes(v) == AllVoted(v) /\ \E p \in Participants : v[p] = "yes"

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Define the set of philosophers and forks *)
Philosophers == 1..N
Forks == 1..N

(* Helper to get the left and right fork for a philosopher *)
LeftFork(i) == i
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES state, forks

(* State can be "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)
StateValues == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking and all forks are free *)
Init == 
    /\ state \in [Philosophers -> StateValues]
    /\ forks = [f \in Forks |-> TRUE]

(* Predicate: philosopher i can start eating (both forks free) *)
CanEat(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] /\ forks[RightFork(i)]

(* Action: philosopher i picks up both forks and starts eating *)
PickUp(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = "hungry"
    /\ CanEat(i)
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = FALSE, ![RightFork(i)] = FALSE]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down both forks after eating *)
PutDown(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = "eating"
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = TRUE, ![RightFork(i)] = TRUE]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry (ready to eat) *)
Think(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = "thinking"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    /\ forks' = forks

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher can transition *)
Next ==
    \E i \in Philosophers :
        PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i) \/ Think(i)

(* Type correctness invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in [Philosophers -> StateValues]
    /\ forks \in [Forks -> BOOLEAN]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, forks>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N \* number of processes, a nonempty finite set of identifiers, N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i, 0 means no ticket *)
(* flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a ticket, FALSE otherwise *)

Init == /\ num = [i \in N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in N |-> FALSE]

(* Choosing phase: process i sets flag[i] to TRUE *)
Choose(i) == 
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>

(* Ticket assignment: process i picks a number larger than any current ticket *)
Assign(i) == 
  LET maxNum == IF \E j \in N: num[j] > 0 THEN MAX {num[j] : j \in N} ELSE 0
  IN /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
      /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
      /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Exit: process i releases its ticket *)
Exit(i) == 
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<flag>>

(* Mutual exclusion: at most one process can have a nonzero ticket *)
MutualExclusion == \A i, j \in N: i # j => num[i] = 0 \/ num[j] = 0

(* Ordering: if two processes have tickets, the one with the smaller ticket goes first *)
Ordering == \A i, j \in N: num[i] # num[j] /\ num[i] > 0 /\ num[j] > 0
             => num[i] < num[j] \/ (num[i] = num[j] /\ i < j)

Next == \E i \in N:
          (Choose(i) \/ Assign(i) \/ Exit(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, full, empty, prod, cons, prod_val, cons_val, step, trace, trace_len, trace_max, trace_limit, trace_limit_exceeded

vars == <<q, full, empty, prod, cons, prod_val, cons_val, step, trace, trace_len, trace_max, trace_limit, trace_limit_exceeded>>

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ full = FALSE
        /\ empty = TRUE
        /\ prod = 0
        /\ cons = 0
        /\ prod_val = 0
        /\ cons_val = 0
        /\ step = 0
        /\ trace = <<>>
        /\ trace_len = 0
        /\ trace_max = 100
        /\ trace_limit = 100
        /\ trace_limit_exceeded = FALSE

ProducerReady == prod = 0
ProducerProducing == prod = 1
ProducerDone == prod = 2

ConsumerReady == cons = 0
ConsumerConsuming == cons = 1
ConsumerDone == cons = 2

ProducerAction ==
    /\ ProducerReady
    /\ prod' = 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<q, full, empty, cons, cons_val, step, trace, trace_len, trace_max, trace_limit, trace_limit_exceeded>>

ProducerProduce ==
    /\ ProducerProducing
    /\ ~full
    /\ q' = Append(q, prod_val)
    /\ full' = (Len(q') = K)
    /\ empty' = FALSE
    /\ prod' = 2
    /\ UNCHANGED <<cons, cons_val, step, trace, trace_len, trace_max, trace_limit, trace_limit_exceeded>>

ProducerDoneAction ==
    /\ ProducerDone
    /\ prod' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<q, full, empty, cons, cons_val, step, trace, trace_len, trace_max, trace_limit, trace_limit_exceeded>>

ConsumerAction ==
    /\ ConsumerReady
    /\ cons' = 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<q, full, empty, prod, prod_val, step, trace, trace_len, trace_max, trace_limit, trace_limit_exceeded>>

ConsumerConsume ==
    /\ ConsumerConsuming
    /\ ~empty
    /\ cons_val' = Head(q)
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ full' = FALSE
    /\ empty' = (Len(q') = 0)
    /\ cons' = 2
    /\ UNCHANGED <<prod, prod_val, step, trace, trace_len, trace_max, trace_limit, trace_limit_exceeded>>

ConsumerDoneAction ==
    /\ ConsumerDone
    /\ cons' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<q, full, empty, prod, prod_val, step, trace, trace_len, trace_max, trace_limit, trace_limit_exceeded>>

Step ==
    /\ step' = step + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<q, full, empty, prod, cons, prod_val, cons_val, trace, trace_len, trace_max, trace_limit, trace_limit_exceeded>>

TraceStep ==
    /\ trace' = Append(trace, <<step, q, full, empty, prod, cons, prod_val, cons_val>>)
    /\ trace_len' = trace_len + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<q, full, empty, prod, cons, prod_val, cons_val, step, trace_max, trace_limit, trace_limit_exceeded>>

Next ==
    \/ ProducerAction
    \/ ProducerProduce
    \/ ProducerDoneAction
    \/ ConsumerAction
    \/ ConsumerConsume
    \/ ConsumerDoneAction
    \/ Step
    \/ TraceStep

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* Number of servers, NULL

(* Server identifiers *)
Servers == 1..N

(* Majority threshold *)
Majority == (N \div 2) + 1

(* Server states *)
State == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* Initial state: all servers are followers with term 0 and no votes *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = [s \in Servers |-> 0]
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Servers |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Follower"]

(* Transition: server s becomes a candidate *)
BecomeCandidate(s) ==
  /\ state[s] = "Follower"
  /\ currentTerm' = [currentTerm EXCEPT ![s] = @ + 1]
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Transition: server s receives a vote from server t *)
ReceiveVote(s, t) ==
  /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
  /\ currentTerm[s] = currentTerm[t]
  /\ votedFor[t] = NULL
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![t] = s]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

(* Transition: server s becomes leader if it has majority votes *)
BecomeLeader(s) ==
  LET votes == {t \in Servers : votedFor[t] = s}
  IN /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
     /\ Cardinality(votes) >= Majority
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
     /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* STRING server can step to any state respecting the rules *)
Next ==
  \E s \in Servers :
    \E action \in {BecomeCandidate, ReceiveVote, BecomeLeader} :
      action(s) \/ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Invariant: no two servers are leaders in the same term *)
TypeOK == \A s, t \in Servers :
            (state[s] = "Leader" /\ state[t] = "Leader") => currentTerm[s] = currentTerm[t]

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

(* readers: set of reader ids currently reading
   writer_active: 0 if no writer, 1 if a writer is active *)

Init == 
    /\ readers = {}
    /\ writer_active = 0

(* Reader i starts reading if no writer is active *)
ReadStart(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ writer_active = 0
    /\ readers' = readers \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<writer_active>>

(* Reader i stops reading *)
ReadEnd(i) == 
    /\ i \in readers
    /\ readers' = readers \ {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<writer_active>>

(* Writer starts writing if no readers or writer *)
WriteStart == 
    /\ readers = {}
    /\ writer_active = 0
    /\ writer_active' = 1
    /\ UNCHANGED readers

(* Writer stops writing *)
WriteEnd == 
    /\ writer_active = 1
    /\ writer_active' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N: ReadStart(i)
        \/ \E i \in readers: ReadEnd(i)
        \/ WriteStart
        \/ WriteEnd

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan

(* Each process is identified by a unique integer in Proc. 
   Channels are pairs (p,q) meaning a FIFO channel from p to q. *)

(* State of each process: a record with a counter and a flag indicating
   whether the process has taken a snapshot. *)
VARIABLES procState, channelState, channel, destination

(* procState[p] = <<cnt, taken>> where cnt is a local counter and
   taken is a BOOLEAN indicating if the snapshot has been taken. *)

(* channelState[c] is a sequence of messages that have arrived on channel c
   but have not yet been processed. *)

(* Initial state: all counters zero, no snapshots taken, all channels empty. *)
Init == /\ procState = [p \in Proc |-> <<0, FALSE>>]
        /\ channelState = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]

(* Helper to get the source and destination of a channel *)
src(c) == FIRST c
dst(c) == LAST c

(* Sending a message on channel c: append a new message to the channel's
   buffer. The message is the current counter of the source process. *)
Send(c) ==
  LET p == src(c) IN
  /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = Append(channelState[c], procState[p][1])]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, channelState>>

(* Receiving a message on channel c: remove the first message from the
   channel's buffer and increment the destination's counter. *)
Receive(c) ==
  LET q == dst(c) IN
  /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(channelState[c])]
  /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![q][1] = procState[q][1] + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED channelState

(* Sending a marker on channel c: a special marker message is appended
   to the channel. *)
SendMarker(c) ==
  LET p == src(c) IN
  /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = Append(channelState[c], "marker")]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, channelState>>

(* Receiving a marker on channel c: if the destination has not yet taken
   a snapshot, it records its state and sends markers on all outgoing
   channels. *)
ReceiveMarker(c) ==
  LET q == dst(c) IN
  /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(channelState[c])]
  /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![q] = <<procState[q][1], TRUE>>]
  /\ UNCHANGED channelState

(* A process can send a normal message if it has not taken a snapshot. *)
SendMsg(p) == \E c \in Chan : src(c) = p /\ ~procState[p][2] /\ Send(c)

(* A process can send a marker if it has taken a snapshot. *)
SendMark(p) == \E c \in Chan : src(c) = p /\ procState[p][2] /\ SendMarker(c)

(* A process can receive a normal message if the channel is non-empty. *)
RecvMsg(p) == \E c \in Chan : dst(c) = p /\ Len(channelState[c]) > 0 /\ Receive(c)

(* A process can receive a marker if the channel is non-empty. *)
RecvMark(p) == \E c \in Chan : dst(c) = p /\ Len(channelState[c]) > 0 /\ ReceiveMarker(c)

(* The next-state relation: any process can perform one of the above actions. *)
Next ==
  \E p \in Proc :
    (SendMsg(p) \/ SendMark(p) \/ RecvMsg(p) \/ RecvMark(p))

(* The specification: initial state and the next-state relation. *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<procState, channelState>>

(* Invariant: all counters are non-negative. *)
TypeOK == \A p \in Proc : procState[p][1] >= 0

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

(* State: a partial function from Keys to Values *)
VARIABLES store

(* Initial state: empty store *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Helper: check if a key is present *)
HasKey(k) == store[k] # NULL

(* Put operation: set key k to value v *)
Put(k, v) ==
  /\ k \in Keys
  /\ v \in Values
  /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Get operation: read value of key k (returns NULL if absent) *)
Get(k) ==
  /\ k \in Keys
  /\ UNCHANGED store

(* Next-state relation: either Put or Get *)
Next == \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v)
       \/ \E k \in Keys: Get(k)

(* Linearizability: Get returns the most recent Put value for the key *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

(* Invariant: store maps each key to a value in Values or NULL *)
TypeOK == \A k \in Keys: store[k] \in Values \cup {NULL}

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, M, V, NULL

(* Ballot numbers are natural numbers *)
Ballot == Nat

(* State of each acceptor: last promised ballot and accepted proposal *)
VARIABLES promised, accepted, proposerBallot, proposerValue

(* Proposer state: current ballot and proposed value *)

(* Helper: check if a proposal is accepted by a majority *)
AcceptedByMajority(p) ==
  LET votes == {a \in 1..N : accepted[a] = p}
  IN Cardinality(votes) > N \div 2

(* Initial state: no promises or accepts, proposers idle *)
Init ==
  /\ promised = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ accepted = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
  /\ proposerBallot = [p \in 1..M |-> 0]
  /\ proposerValue = [p \in 1..M |-> NULL]

(* Phase 1: proposer sends prepare, acceptors promise if ballot higher *)
Prepare(p, b) ==
  /\ proposerBallot[p] = b
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : b >= promised[i]
  /\ promised' = [promised EXCEPT ![i] = b |-> b]

(* Phase 2: proposer sends accept, acceptors accept if still promised *)
Accept(p, b, v) ==
  /\ proposerBallot[p] = b
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : b = promised[i]
  /\ accepted' = [accepted EXCEPT ![i] = v |-> v]

(* Proposer chooses next ballot and value *)
Propose(p, v) ==
  LET b == Max({promised[i] : i \in 1..N}) + 1
  IN /\ proposerBallot' = [proposerBallot EXCEPT ![p] = b]
     /\ proposerValue' = [proposerValue EXCEPT ![p] = v]
     /\ Prepare(p, b)
     /\ Accept(p, b, v)

(* One step: any proposer may propose a value *)
Next ==
  \E p \in 1..M : Propose(p, CHOOSE v \in V : TRUE)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<promised, accepted, proposerBallot, proposerValue>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

(* A file is a sequence of chunks. *)
Chunks == CHUNKS(File)

(* Sender state *)
VARIABLES sent, acked, retrans, failed

(* sent: set of indices of chunks sent at least once
   acked: set of indices of chunks successfully received
   retrans: mapping from chunk index to number of retransmissions attempted
   failed: set of indices of chunks that exceeded MAX_RETRIES *)

(* Helper predicates *)
Sent(i) == i \in sent
Acked(i) == i \in acked
RetransCount(i) == IF i \in DOMAIN retrans THEN retrans[i] ELSE 0
Failed(i) == i \in failed

(* Initial state: nothing sent, no acks, zero retransmissions *)
Init == /\ sent = {}
        /\ acked = {}
        /\ retrans = <<>>
        /\ failed = {}

(* Sending a new chunk: nondeterministically choose an unsent chunk *)
SendNew ==
  CHOOSE i \in Chunks : ~Sent(i) /\ ~Failed(i) ->
    /\ sent' = sent \cup {i}
    /\ retrans' = [retrans EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acked, failed>>

(* Retransmission of a lost chunk: nondeterministically choose a sent but unacked chunk *)
Retransmit ==
  CHOOSE i \in sent \setminus acked : ~Failed(i) ->
    /\ retrans' = [retrans EXCEPT ![i] = RetransCount(i) + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acked, failed, sent>>

(* Successful receipt of a chunk: nondeterministically choose a sent chunk *)
AckChunk ==
  CHOOSE i \in sent : ~Acked(i) ->
    /\ acked' = acked \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, retrans, failed>>

(* Giving up on a chunk after exceeding retries *)
GiveUp ==
  CHOOSE i \in sent \setminus acked : RetransCount(i) >= MAX_RETRIES ->
    /\ failed' = failed \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, retrans, acked>>

(* One step of the protocol *)
Next ==
  \/ SendNew
  \/ Retransmit
  \/ AckChunk
  \/ GiveUp

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, acked, retrans, failed>>

(* Invariant: no chunk is both acknowledged and failed *)
TypeOK == \A i \in Chunks : ~(Acked(i) /\ Failed(i))

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Clients, Keys, Values
VARIABLES db, active, reads, writes, status

TypeOK ==
    /\ db \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ active \subseteq Clients
    /\ reads \in [Clients -> [Keys -> Values]]
    /\ writes \in [Clients -> [Keys -> Values]]
    /\ status \in [Clients -> {"idle","begin","commit","abort"}]

Init ==
    /\ db = [k \in Keys |-> 0]
    /\ active = {}
    /\ \A c \in Clients: reads[c] = [k \in Keys |-> 0]
    /\ \A c \in Clients: writes[c] = [k \in Keys |-> 0]
    /\ status = [c \in Clients |-> "idle"]

Start(c) ==
    /\ c \notin active
    /\ status[c] = "idle"
    /\ active' = active \cup {c}
    /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![c] = "begin"]
    /\ reads' = [reads EXCEPT ![c] = db]
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![c] = [k \in Keys |-> 0]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, active, status>>

Commit(c) ==
    /\ c \in active
    /\ status[c] = "commit"
    /\ \A k \in Keys: db[k] # writes[c][k]
    /\ db' = [k \in Keys |-> IF writes[c][k] = 0 THEN db[k] ELSE writes[c][k]]
    /\ active' = active \ {c}
    /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![c] = "idle"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<reads, writes>>

Abort(c) ==
    /\ c \in active
    /\ status[c] = "abort"
    /\ active' = active \ {c}
    /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![c] = "idle"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, reads, writes>>

Read(c, k) ==
    /\ c \in active
    /\ status[c] = "begin"
    /\ \E v \in Values: reads[c][k] = v

Write(c, k, v) ==
    /\ c \in active
    /\ status[c] = "begin"
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![c][k] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, active, status, reads>>

Next ==
    \E c \in Clients :
        (Start(c) \/ Commit(c) \/ Abort(c) \/ Read(c, CHOOSE k \in Keys: k) \/ Write(c, CHOOSE k \in Keys: k, CHOOSE v \in Values: v))

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, active, reads, writes, status>>

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

(* Variables: *)
VARIABLES clocks, offsets

(* Initial state: all clocks start at 0, offsets are 0 *)
Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Helper: compute the average of all clocks *)
Avg == (SUM i \in 1..N : clocks[i]) \div N

(* One synchronization step: each node adjusts its clock towards the average *)
Step ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        LET diff == Avg - clocks[i] IN
        /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + diff]
        /\ offsets' = offsets

(* One round of synchronization: all nodes adjust simultaneously *)
Round ==
  /\ \A i \in 1..N :
        LET diff == Avg - clocks[i] IN
        /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + diff]
        /\ offsets' = offsets

(* The system evolves by either a single step or a full round *)
Next == Step \/ Round

(* Specification: start from Init and evolve according to Next *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

(* Invariant: all clocks remain within epsilon of each other *)
TypeOK == \A i, j \in 1..N : Abs(clocks[i] - clocks[j]) <= epsilon

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES flag, turn

(* flag is a function from {P1, P2} to BOOLEAN *)
(* turn is either P1 or P2 *)

Init == /\ flag = [P1 |-> FALSE, P2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = P1

(* Process i attempts to enter critical section *)
Enter(i) ==
  LET j == IF i = P1 THEN P2 ELSE P1 IN
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ turn' = j

(* Process i exits critical section *)
Exit(i) ==
  LET j == IF i = P1 THEN P2 ELSE P1 IN
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
  /\ turn' = turn

(* Mutual exclusion: at most one process in critical section *)
MutualExclusion ==
  ~(flag[P1] /\ flag[P2])

(* Progress: if a process wants to enter, it will eventually succeed *)
Progress ==
  (flag[P1] /\ ~flag[P2] /\ turn = P2) \/ (flag[P2] /\ ~flag[P1] /\ turn = P1)

Next ==
  \E i \in {P1, P2} : Enter(i) \/ Exit(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Nodes

(* Each node is identified by an integer in 1..N *)
NodeSet == 1..N

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES known, infected

(* Initialization: no node knows any updates, none infected *)
Init == /\ known = [i \in NodeSet |-> {}]
        /\ infected = {}

(* Helper: a node can send its known updates to a neighbor *)
Send(i, j) == 
  \E updates \in known[i] : 
    /\ j \in NodeSet
    /\ updates \in known[i]
    /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![j] = @ \cup {updates}]

(* Helper: a node becomes infected if it receives any new update *)
Infect(i) == 
  /\ infected' = infected \cup {i}
  /\ UNCHANGED known

(* Transition: a node i may send updates to a neighbor j, or become infected *)
Next == 
  \E i, j \in NodeSet :
    \/ Send(i, j)
    \/ (i \in infected /\ Infect(i))

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

(* Invariant: all known sets are subsets of the union of all updates *)
TypeOK == \A i \in NodeSet : known[i] \subseteq \cup (VALUES known)

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
CONSTANT Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

IsFree(p) == p \in free

Alloc(c, p) ==
  /\ IsFree(p)
  /\ free' = free \ {p}
  /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]

Free(c, p) ==
  /\ p \in allocated[c]
  /\ free' = free \cup {p}
  /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]

Next == \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
          Alloc(c, p) \/ Free(c, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PubSubBroker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Topics, Subscribers, Messages

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES subscriptions, inboxes
IsSubscriber(s) == s \in Subscribers
IsTopic(t) == t \in Topics
IsMessage(m) == m \in Messages

(* Initial state: no subscriptions, empty inboxes *)
Init ==
    /\ subscriptions = [t \in Topics |-> {}]
    /\ inboxes = [s \in Subscribers |-> <<>>]

(* Subscribe action: subscriber s subscribes to topic t *)
Subscribe(s, t) ==
    /\ IsSubscriber(s)
    /\ IsTopic(t)
    /\ subscriptions' = [subscriptions EXCEPT ![t] = @ \cup {s}]
    /\ inboxes' = inboxes

(* Unsubscribe action: subscriber s unsubscribes from topic t *)
Unsubscribe(s, t) ==
    /\ IsSubscriber(s)
    /\ IsTopic(t)
    /\ subscriptions' = [subscriptions EXCEPT ![t] = @ \ {s}]
    /\ inboxes' = inboxes

(* Publish action: publisher posts message m to topic t *)
Publish(m, t) ==
    /\ IsMessage(m)
    /\ IsTopic(t)
    /\ LET subs == subscriptions[t]
           updates == [s \in subs |-> Append(inboxes[s], m)]
       IN inboxes' = [inboxes EXCEPT ![s] = updates[s] : s \in subs]
    /\ subscriptions' = subscriptions

(* Next-state relation: any action may occur *)
Next ==
    \E s \in Subscribers : \E t \in Topics :
        (Subscribe(s, t) \/ Unsubscribe(s, t))
    \/ \E m \in Messages : \E t \in Topics :
        Publish(m, t)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscriptions, inboxes>>

(* Invariant: inboxes contain only messages *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ subscriptions \in [Topics -> SUBSET Subscribers]
    /\ inboxes \in [Subscribers -> Seq(Messages)]

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

Proc(i) ==
  LET j == 1 - i IN
  /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ turn' = j
  /\ wants[j]
  /\ turn' = i
  /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>
  /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

Next == \/ Proc(0)
        \/ Proc(1)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0,1}
          /\ wants \in {<<FALSE, FALSE>>, <<TRUE, FALSE>>, <<FALSE, TRUE>>}

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, Nodes

(* Each node has a vector of counters, one per node *)
VARIABLES counts

(* Initial state: all counters zero *)
Init == counts = [n \in Nodes |-> [m \in Nodes |-> 0]]

(* Increment at node i: increase its own slot *)
Inc(i) == 
  /\ i \in Nodes
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i][i] = @ + 1]

(* Merge state of node i with state of node j: element-wise max *)
Merge(i, j) ==
  /\ i \in Nodes /\ j \in Nodes
  /\ counts' = [k \in Nodes |-> [l \in Nodes |-> 
        IF k = i /\ l = j THEN Max(counts[i][l], counts[j][l])



(* Next-state relation: any node may increment or merge with any other *)
Next == \E i \in Nodes : (Inc(i) \/ \E j \in Nodes : Merge(i, j))

(* Total count is sum of maximums of each column *)
Total == \Sum n \in Nodes : Max(\{ counts[i][n] : i \in Nodes \})

(* Invariant: all counters are nonnegative *)
TypeOK == \A i, j \in Nodes : counts[i][j] \in Nat

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts
